source.catalog_ref: I-EU10 (collegiate off-road benchmark Mexico, I-LA thread)

full_prompt: Design the front wheel hub and upright (steering knuckle) assembly of a collegiate off-road benchmark Mexico 2026 car. Vehicle curb 275 kg + driver 90 kg; front axle supports 42% = 153 kg, per front wheel 77 kg. Tire rolling radius 280 mm. The hub is a machined 7075-T6 aluminum part (E 71.7 GPa, yield 503 MPa, ultimate 572 MPa, density 2810 kg/m^3) carrying a press-fit 6205-2RS deep-groove ball bearing (ID 25 mm, OD 52 mm, width 15 mm) and four M10 class 10.9 lug studs on a 100 mm PCD for the wheel. The upright is a separate machined 6061-T6 aluminum part (E 68.9 GPa, yield 276 MPa, ultimate 310 MPa, density 2700 kg/m^3) that mounts the hub bearing, two ball-joint tapers for upper/lower A-arms, one steering tie-rod tapered mount, and two M10 class 10.9 brake-caliper mount bolts. Assembly envelope: overall 180 mm wide x 200 mm tall. Load cases: (LC1) static 1 g corner: vertical reaction 755 N at tire contact patch, transmitted through hub to bearing; (LC2) 3 g bump: 2266 N vertical at tire patch; (LC3) 1.5 g cornering lateral on outside wheel: 1133 N lateral + 755 N vertical at tire patch (lateral creates moment on upright about bearing); (LC4) braking 1.2 g fore-aft: 906 N fore-aft at tire patch + 2200 N torque reaction at caliper mount bolts (mu = 0.45 at pad, rotor radius 140 mm gives caliper bolts 8.8 kN shear equivalent per conservative factor); (LC5) pothole 5 g vertical: 3776 N at tire patch; (LC6) mandatory scrutineering 3 g combined vertical + 2 g lateral + 1 g longitudinal as conservative envelope per collegiate off-road benchmark T.6. Pass/fail: (R1) hub max stress under LC1-LC4 must remain below 335 MPa (503 / 1.5 yield FoS); (R2) upright max stress under LC1-LC4 must remain below 184 MPa (276 / 1.5 yield FoS); (R3) under LC5 and LC6, yield must not be reached (503 MPa hub, 276 MPa upright); (R4) hub + upright combined dry mass must not exceed 3.5 kg; (R5) bearing press-fit seat deflection under LC2 must remain below 25 microns to preserve bearing radial play; (R6) M10 lug stud shear under LC4 braking reaction must remain below 375 MPa (class 10.9 shear allowable). Thermal, fluid, radiation analyses not primary. A buckling check is inapplicable at this part scale. Deliverables: STEP AP242 assembly with hub, upright, bearing (reference model), 4 lug studs, caliper bolts as separate bodies; machining notes; FEA per load case; bearing-seat deflection report; mass budget.
short_prompt:
Design the front wheel hub and upright (steering knuckle) assembly of a collegiate off-road benchmark Mexico 2026 car. Vehicle curb 275 kg + 90 kg driver; front axle 42% = 153 kg (77 kg per wheel); tire rolling radius 280 mm. Hub: 7075-T6 aluminum around a press-fit 6205-2RS (25 ID x 52 OD x 15) bearing and 4 x M10 class 10.9 lug studs on a 100 mm PCD. Upright: 6061-T6 aluminum carrying the hub bearing, two A-arm ball-joint tapers, one tie-rod taper, and 2 x M10 class 10.9 caliper bolts. Assembly envelope 180 x 200 mm.

Factor regime: hub yield FoS 1.5 (allowable 335 MPa) on LC1-LC4; upright yield FoS 1.5 (allowable 184 MPa) on LC1-LC4; LC5-LC6 must stay below yield (503 / 276 MPa); hub + upright combined dry mass <= 3.5 kg; bearing-seat deflection under bump < 25 microns (preserve bearing radial play); M10 10.9 lug-stud shear allowable 375 MPa under braking.

Load cases.
- Static 1 g corner: 755 N vertical at the contact patch.
- 3 g bump: 2266 N vertical.
- 1.5 g cornering outside wheel: 1133 N lateral + 755 N vertical (creates upright moment about the bearing).
- 1.2 g fore-aft braking: 906 N + 2200 N torque reaction at the caliper mount (mu = 0.45 at 140 mm rotor radius giving ~8.8 kN caliper-bolt shear equivalent).
- 5 g pothole: 3776 N vertical.
- Baja T.6 scrutineering envelope: 3 g vertical + 2 g lateral + 1 g longitudinal combined.

prompt.title: collegiate off-road benchmark Mexico 2026 Front Hub + Upright Assembly
prompt.brief: 7075-T6 machined hub + 6061-T6 upright for 77 kg corner, bearing press-fit, collegiate off-road benchmark + MX FoS 1.5.

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: solid TET10 for hub and upright; contact at bearing press-fit surface

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Hub rotates well below structural modes.
exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Brake heating handled by caliper, not hub (which is separate from rotor).
exclusions_explained.buckling_analysis: N/A at this compact part scale.
